member.name: M:Exceptionless.ExceptionlessExtensions.UseExceptionless(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Ensures that the Exceptionless pending queue is processed before the host shuts down.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.ExceptionlessExtensions.AddExceptionless(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Exceptionless.ExceptionlessClient)
member.summary: Adds the given pre-configured to the services collection as a singleton.
member.param: The to add the instance to as a singleton.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.ExceptionlessExtensions.AddExceptionless(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an instance to the services collection as a singleton using the specified api key.
member.param: The to add the instance to as a singleton.
The Exceptionless api key to use.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.ExceptionlessExtensions.AddExceptionless(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Exceptionless.ExceptionlessConfiguration})
member.summary: Adds an instance to the services collection as a singleton.
member.param: The to add the instance to as a singleton.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.ExceptionlessExtensions.AddExceptionless(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Action{Exceptionless.ExceptionlessConfiguration})
member.summary: Adds an instance to the services collection as a singleton.
member.param: The to add the instance to as a singleton.
The to use to configure the instance.
